included.description: Convenience-store fuel stop at I-24 Exit 180B (Rossville Blvd) with 24-hour diesel and a small truck lot (about 4 truck spaces). Amenities include convenience store, deli, ATM, bulk DEF and WiFi.

Fuel stop at I-24 Exit 175 (Browns Ferry Rd, Lookout Valley) with 24-hour diesel (about 3 lanes) and limited truck parking listed as overnight-capable. On-site McDonald's and Hardee's, convenience store, ATM and WiFi.

held.hold_reason: Truck access/parking unconfirmed: sources conflict — iExit lists 'truck parking' at I-24 Exit 174 but the truckstopsandservices detail shows 0 truck/paid/reserved spaces. Likely a car-oriented convenience store; cannot confirm category-fit.

Truck parking unconfirmed and conflicting: one listing cites overnight/secured parking, another states 'no parking' at this downtown I-24 Exit 178 site (100 W 20th St, 37408). Cannot confirm 18-wheeler access/parking.

excluded.reason: Out of corridor: located at I-24/I-59 Exit 169 in Wildwood, GA (650 GA-299), on the I-59 junction across the state line — not within the TN I-24 Chattanooga segment (exits 167-185).
Out of corridor: I-24 Exit 158, 260 TVA Rd, Jasper, TN — roughly 20+ miles west of the Chattanooga metro segment (handled by the Monteagle segment).

excluded.business_name: East Ridge hotels (Baymont, Econo Lodge, La Quinta, TownePlace Suites)
excluded.reason: Served by I-75 Exit 1 (Ringgold Rd), not an I-24 exit; primarily serve a different interstate and truck parking not independently confirmed.
No TDOT/THP commercial scale complex exists on I-24 in the Chattanooga metro; nearest is Manchester (I-24 MM115). Nothing to list per weigh-station rules.
No CAT Scale within exits 167-185; nearest are Exit 158 (Love's, Jasper) and Exit 169 (Pilot, Wildwood GA), both out of corridor.
